findings.summary: The supplied implementation, RED/GREEN results, security review, native-API addendum, manifest, and runner source provide sufficient evidence for AC-013: anchored no-follow authority and source reads, retained-handle hashing/copying, held destination parents, verified same-parent temporaries, handle-relative atomic publication, hard-link-alias preservation, fail-closed capability checks, deterministic partial-install state, complete rollback, and post-install verification are covered without relying on downstream quality-gate artifacts.
